assessment.note: Skip/evasion on the pace check; no usable signal yet, and clarity remains untouched after two turns.

new_queue.label: Decision drag
new_queue.name: Where are decisions still hanging around longer than they should?
new_queue.description: Surfaces stalled choices that may be slowing the work without sounding like a generic blocker check.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Hidden rework
new_queue.name: What part of the work is creating extra churn for you?
new_queue.description: Looks for avoidable rework or process friction that the first blocker question may not catch.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff call
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do this cycle?
new_queue.description: Forces a real prioritization tradeoff and reveals whether the current focus is deliberate or crowded.

new_queue.label: Update landing
new_queue.name: How are your updates landing with the people who rely on them?
new_queue.description: Probes whether communication is creating alignment or still leaving others unsure.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks easier from my side?
new_queue.description: Opens concrete asks for support, air cover, decisions, or context.

new_queue.label: Close on next step
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Leaves the meeting with a clear next focus and no new topic introduced.
